recommendations.title: Bring It On: Cheer Or Die
recommendations.overview: When a cheer squad practices their routines on Halloween weekend in an abandoned school, they are picked off one by one by an unknown killer.

recommendations.title: Superhost
recommendations.overview: Two travel vloggers check into a vacation rental with a host that will do anything for a good review.

recommendations.title: Tamara
recommendations.overview: Tamara, an unattractive girl who is picked on by her peers, returns after her death as a sexy seductress to enact revenge.

recommendations.title: Make Me Believe
recommendations.overview: Two meddling grannies trick their adult grandkids into a meet-cute that reignites a childhood crush and old grudges.

recommendations.title: Double, Double, Toil and Trouble
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Horror, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: On Halloween night, two precocious little girls try to save their parents from their nasty old capitalist aunt's greedy clutches. Magic abounds and they meet mysterious new friends along the way.

recommendations.title: DeVour
recommendations.overview: Friends become increasingly addicted to a video game that has an evil agenda.

recommendations.title: Boys in the Trees
recommendations.overview: On Halloween 1997, two estranged teen skaters embark on a surreal journey through their memories, dreams and fears.

recommendations.title: Night of the Demons
recommendations.overview: When partygoers at a deserted funeral home decide to have a séance on Halloween night, they awaken something evil with a thirst for blood.

recommendations.title: Sons of the Desert
recommendations.overview: Ollie and Stan deceive their wives into thinking they are taking a medically necessary cruise when they are really going to a lodge convention.

recommendations.title: KONOSUBA – God's blessing on this wonderful world! Legend of Crimson
recommendations.overview: After receiving a warning that Yunyun's hometown is in danger, Kazuma's party is relieved to discover it's only a joke...until it isn't. The Demon King's general has just arrived to obtain The Mage Killer, a weapon with world-ending power.
